name: Attack Potion
description: Choose #b1 of #b3 random #yAttack cards to add to your hand, it costs #b0 this turn. Choose #b1 of #b3 random #yAttack cards and add #b2 copies to your hand, they cost #b0 this turn.

name: Blessing of the Forge
description: Upgrade all cards in your hand for the rest of combat.

name: Block Potion

description: Choose #b1 of #b3 random #yColorless cards to add to your hand, it costs #b0 this turn. Choose #b1 of #b3 random #yColorless cards and add #b2 copies to your hand, they cost #b0 this turn.

description: Gain #b  Max HP.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Escape from a non-boss combat. Receive no rewards. I'm Surrounded!
